message:
feat(trauma_guard): implement fuzzy command matching for death spiral detection (ft-so7qh.2)

Add token-aware fuzzy command variation detection to the Trauma Guard,
enabling it to recognize trivial command variations as part of the same
failure loop rather than requiring exact hash matches.

Core algorithm (TraumaState::is_trivial_variation):
1. Normalize command text (lowercase, collapse whitespace)
2. Strip common execution prefixes (cargo, npm run, python, etc.)
   configurable via TraumaConfig::execution_prefixes
3. Tokenize and compute two similarity metrics:
   - Jaro-Winkler character-level similarity on the command fingerprint
   - Jaccard token-level similarity on deduplicated sorted tokens
4. Extract critical flags (--all, --lib, -p, --workspace, etc.) and
   break the repeat chain if critical flags differ between commands,
   since flag changes represent genuine semantic intent changes
   (e.g. "cargo test --lib" vs "cargo test --all" are NOT trivial variations)

New data structures:
- CommandFeatures: holds hash, fingerprint, tokens, critical flags
- TraumaEvent extended with command_fingerprint, command_tokens,
  critical_flags fields for retrospective analysis

New helper functions:
- normalize_command_text: whitespace collapse + lowercase
- strip_execution_prefix: longest-prefix-first matching
- tokenize_command: split, trim punctuation, sort, dedup
- extract_critical_flags: binary search against configured flag list
- has_critical_flag_conflict: symmetric mismatch check
- token_jaccard_similarity: set intersection/union ratio

Configuration additions to TraumaConfig:
- command_similarity_threshold (default 0.88)
- token_jaccard_threshold (default 0.60)
- strip_execution_prefixes (default true)
- execution_prefixes and critical_flags lists with sane defaults
- sanitize_config validates thresholds in [0.0, 1.0], sorts prefixes
  by length descending for correct longest-match semantics

Tests added:
- fuzzy_variations_intervene_after_threshold: trivial flag additions
  (e.g. -v, --verbose) correctly accumulate as repeat loop
- semantic_flag_change_breaks_repeat_chain: --lib -> --all resets count
- prefix_stripping_links_equivalent_commands: "cargo test -p foo" and
  "test -p foo" treated as same command after prefix strip
- e2e_fuzzy_variation_loop_decision_is_deterministic: 4-command
  sequence verifies exact intervention/repeat_count vectors
- e2e_semantic_change_resets_loop_and_recovers: chain break + recovery
- proptest_token_jaccard_similarity_is_symmetric: property test
- E2E shell script (tests/e2e/test_ft_so7qh_2.sh): 177-line harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,177 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.." && pwd)"
+LOG_DIR="${ROOT_DIR}/tests/e2e/logs"
+mkdir -p "${LOG_DIR}"
+
+RUN_ID="$(date +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")"
+SCENARIO_ID="ft_so7qh_2_fuzzy_command_matching"
+CORRELATION_ID="ft-so7qh.2-${RUN_ID}"
+PANE_ID=1
+
+LOG_FILE="${LOG_DIR}/ft_so7qh_2_${RUN_ID}.jsonl"
+
+emit_log() {
+  local outcome="$1"
+  local scenario="$2"
+  local command_input="$3"
+  local decision_path="$4"
+  local reason_code="$5"
+  local error_code="$6"
+  local artifact_path="$7"
+  local input_summary="$8"
+  local ts
+  local command_hash
+
+  ts="$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
+  command_hash="$(printf '%s' "${command_input}" | cksum | awk '{print $1}')"
+
+  jq -cn \
+    --arg timestamp "${ts}" \
+    --arg component "trauma_guard.e2e" \
+    --arg scenario_id "${SCENARIO_ID}:${scenario}" \
+    --arg correlation_id "${CORRELATION_ID}" \
+    --arg pane_id "${PANE_ID}" \
+    --arg command_hash "${command_hash}" \
+    --arg decision_path "${decision_path}" \
+    --arg input_summary "${input_summary}" \
+    --arg outcome "${outcome}" \
+    --arg reason_code "${reason_code}" \
+    --arg decision_reason "${reason_code}" \
+    --arg error_code "${error_code}" \
+    --arg artifact_path "${artifact_path}" \
+    '{
+      timestamp: $timestamp,
+      component: $component,
+      scenario_id: $scenario_id,
+      correlation_id: $correlation_id,
+      pane_id: ($pane_id | tonumber),
+      command_hash: ($command_hash | tonumber),
+      decision_path: $decision_path,
+      input_summary: $input_summary,
+      outcome: $outcome,
+      reason_code: $reason_code,
+      decision_reason: $decision_reason,
+      error_code: $error_code,
+      artifact_path: $artifact_path
+    }' >> "${LOG_FILE}"
+}
+
+run_target_test() {
+  local scenario="$1"
+  local test_name="$2"
+  local command_input="$3"
+  local decision_path="$4"
+  local success_reason="$5"
+
+  local stdout_file="${LOG_DIR}/ft_so7qh_2_${RUN_ID}_${scenario}.stdout.log"
+  local test_cmd=(
+    rch exec --
+    env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-rch-ft-so7qh-2
+    cargo test -p frankenterm-core "${test_name}" -- --nocapture
+  )
+
+  emit_log \
+    "running" \
+    "${scenario}" \
+    "${command_input}" \
+    "cargo_test" \
+    "none" \
+    "none" \
+    "$(basename "${stdout_file}")" \
+    "Executing: ${test_cmd[*]}"
+
+  set +e
+  (
+    cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
+    "${test_cmd[@]}"
+  ) 2>&1 | tee "${stdout_file}"
+  local status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
+  set -e
+
+  if [[ ${status} -ne 0 ]]; then
+    emit_log \
+      "failed" \
+      "${scenario}" \
+      "${command_input}" \
+      "cargo_test" \
+      "test_failure" \
+      "cargo_test_failed" \
+      "$(basename "${stdout_file}")" \
+      "test=${test_name} exit=${status}"
+    return "${status}"
+  fi
+
+  if ! grep -q "${test_name} ... ok" "${stdout_file}"; then
+    emit_log \
+      "failed" \
+      "${scenario}" \
+      "${command_input}" \
+      "assertion_check" \
+      "unexpected_test_output" \
+      "missing_success_marker" \
+      "$(basename "${stdout_file}")" \
+      "Expected success marker for ${test_name}"
+    return 1
+  fi
+
+  emit_log \
+    "passed" \
+    "${scenario}" \
+    "${command_input}" \
+    "${decision_path}" \
+    "${success_reason}" \
+    "none" \
+    "$(basename "${stdout_file}")" \
+    "test=${test_name}"
+
+  return 0
+}
+
+emit_log \
+  "started" \
+  "suite_init" \
+  "cargo test -p frankenterm-core trauma_guard fuzzy matching suite" \
+  "script_init" \
+  "none" \
+  "none" \
+  "$(basename "${LOG_FILE}")" \
+  "scenarios=2"
+
+if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  emit_log \
+    "failed" \
+    "suite_init" \
+    "rch exec -- cargo test ..." \
+    "preflight_rch" \
+    "rch_missing" \
+    "rch_not_found" \
+    "$(basename "${LOG_FILE}")" \
+    "rch must be installed for offloaded cargo execution"
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+run_target_test \
+  "trivial_variation_loop" \
+  "e2e_fuzzy_variation_loop_decision_is_deterministic" \
+  "cargo test -p foo --verbose" \
+  "record_command_result->fuzzy_match->loop_intervention" \
+  "recurring_failure_loop"
+
+run_target_test \
+  "semantic_change_recovery" \
+  "e2e_semantic_change_resets_loop_and_recovers" \
+  "cargo test --all" \
+  "record_command_result->critical_flag_guard->allow_recovery" \
+  "semantic_change_resets_loop"
+
+emit_log \
+  "passed" \
+  "suite_complete" \
+  "ft-so7qh.2" \
+  "suite_complete" \
+  "all_scenarios_passed" \
+  "none" \
+  "$(basename "${LOG_FILE}")" \
+  "scenarios=2"
